summary: Frontend E2E of the new Account Documents section on /accounts/d4e2187a-5e7d-4847-902b-b6699ae910fc (Empire Restaurant). All 8 scenarios in the review request passed cleanly on the preview URL as CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth. Category dropdown renders the 3 real Files & Documents categories; upload/reupload/delete work; approved contract Nyla_Citadel.pdf appears in the list with the 'Signed Contract' badge; docs uploaded from the account are visible on the global /files-documents page.
critical_code_review_comments: AccountDocumentsSection: filesAPI.getDocuments call has no pagination limit — if the linked-entity list grows large it will fetch every doc; consider adding a per_page param.

AccountDocumentsSection re-upload/delete rely on optimistic toasts + fetchDocs re-poll. On slow networks the row may appear stale for a moment; not blocking but worth a tiny in-place update to avoid full refetch.
seed_data_creation: Uploaded one test file (test_doc.pdf) via account documents; re-uploaded with test_doc2.pdf; then deleted at end. Account left clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Radix Select needs page.wait_for_timeout(300) after clicking the trigger before selecting an option — otherwise the option click races animation. Files & Documents route is /files-documents and uses data-testid=document-card-<id> for each row, useful to verify cross-module persistence.
